user.title: Waterbeep Setup
user.description: Sign in with your Waterbeep (Aquamatrix) account. Your NIF is the account User Code. Data is refreshed twice a day (01:00 and 13:00).

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Waterbeep
reauth_confirm.description: The stored password for {username} no longer works. Enter the current Waterbeep password to continue.

contact.title: Two-factor verification
contact.description: Waterbeep needs a one-time code. Choose where it should be sent.

otp.title: Enter verification code
otp.description: Enter the one-time code Waterbeep just sent you.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to reach the Waterbeep service
error.otp_send_failed: Waterbeep could not send the verification code

abort.already_configured: This Waterbeep account is already configured
